autopilot-reviewer.description: Autopilot methodology code reviewer — Three Red Lines discipline (closure / fact-driven / exhaustiveness). Use when performing pre-commit/pre-merge review, security audit, or plan critique.

autopilot-debugger.description: Systematic debugging agent for root cause analysis. Use when: 'debug', 'investigate', 'root cause', '為什麼會壞', '追蹤問題'.

autopilot-planner.description: Task decomposition and planning agent. Use when: 'plan', 'decompose', 'break down', '規劃', '拆解任務'.
